phenotypes.base_medium: Phenotype-microarray / substrate-utilisation assay (defined minimal + sole substrate)
Phenotype-microarray / substrate-utilisation assay (defined minimal + sole substrate)
Enzyme / activity assay (hydrolysis, degradation, reduction, electron transfer) in a test medium — not a sole-substrate growth test
phenotypes.citation: BacDive strain 158595 (Reimer LC et al., BacDive 2022, NAR); https://bacdive.dsmz.de/strain/158595
